scriptLines:
query: 'SELECT
    CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), a.fecha_afiliacion, 112) AS INT) AS fecha_key,
    b.beneficiaria_key,
    pr.programa_key,
    NULL AS producto_key,
    eo.estado_key,
    'AFILIACION' AS tipo_evento,
    CAST(a.afiliacion_id AS VARCHAR(100)) AS id_evento_origen,
    1 AS cantidad_eventos,
    NULL AS monto_bs,
    NULL AS monto_productos,
    NULL AS monto_carnes,
    NULL AS cantidad_kg,
    NULL AS peso_kg,
    NULL AS mes,
    NULL AS gestion,
    a.tipo_subsidio,
    NULL AS tipo_carne,
    NULL AS productos,
    emp.razon_social AS empleador,
    cj.nombre AS caja_salud,
    NULL AS supermercado,
    NULL AS punto_entrega,
    NULL AS lote
FROM silver.spl_afiliaciones a
LEFT JOIN gold.dim_beneficiaria b
    ON b.ci_normalizado = a.ci_beneficiaria_normalizado
LEFT JOIN gold.dim_programa_social pr
    ON pr.codigo_programa = 'SPL'
LEFT JOIN gold.dim_estado_operacion eo
    ON eo.estado_normalizado = a.estado
LEFT JOIN silver.spl_empleadores emp
    ON emp.empleador_id = a.empleador_id
LEFT JOIN silver.spl_cajas cj
    ON cj.caja_id = a.caja_id
WHERE a.registro_valido = 1

UNION ALL

SELECT
    CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), DATEFROMPARTS(am.gestion, am.mes, 1), 112) AS INT),
    b.beneficiaria_key,
    pr.programa_key,
    NULL,
    eo.estado_key,
    'ASIGNACION',
    CAST(am.asignacion_id AS VARCHAR(100)),
    1,
    am.monto_bs,
    am.monto_productos,
    am.monto_carnes,
    NULL,
    NULL,
    am.mes,
    am.gestion,
    a.tipo_subsidio,
    NULL,
    NULL,
    emp.razon_social,
    cj.nombre,
    NULL,
    NULL,
    NULL
FROM silver.spl_asignaciones_mensuales am
LEFT JOIN silver.spl_afiliaciones a
    ON a.afiliacion_id = am.afiliacion_id
LEFT JOIN gold.dim_beneficiaria b
    ON b.ci_normalizado = a.ci_beneficiaria_normalizado
LEFT JOIN gold.dim_programa_social pr
    ON pr.codigo_programa = 'SPL'
LEFT JOIN gold.dim_estado_operacion eo
    ON eo.estado_normalizado = am.estado
LEFT JOIN silver.spl_empleadores emp
    ON emp.empleador_id = a.empleador_id
LEFT JOIN silver.spl_cajas cj
    ON cj.caja_id = a.caja_id
WHERE am.registro_valido = 1
  AND am.gestion IS NOT NULL
  AND am.mes BETWEEN 1 AND 12

UNION ALL

SELECT
    CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), ea.fecha_entrega, 112) AS INT),
    b.beneficiaria_key,
    pr.programa_key,
    dp.producto_key,
    NULL,
    'ENTREGA_AGENCIA',
    CAST(ea.entrega_ag_id AS VARCHAR(100)),
    1,
    NULL,
    NULL,
    NULL,
    NULL,
    ea.peso_kg,
    NULL,
    NULL,
    NULL,
    NULL,
    ea.productos,
    NULL,
    NULL,
    NULL,
    ea.punto_entrega,
    ea.lote
FROM silver.spl_entregas_agencia ea
LEFT JOIN gold.dim_beneficiaria b
    ON b.ci_normalizado = ea.ci_beneficiaria_normalizado
LEFT JOIN gold.dim_programa_social pr
    ON pr.codigo_programa = 'SPL'
LEFT JOIN gold.dim_producto_paquete dp
    ON dp.nombre_producto = ea.productos
   AND dp.fuente_origen = 'SPL'
WHERE ea.registro_valido = 1',
